test.note: Autopilot tests pass including VAL-AUTOPILOT-039, VAL-AUTOPILOT-040, VAL-AUTOPILOT-041. One pre-existing worktree test failure is unrelated (pnpm install failure in fixture, not feature-related).

lint.note: No lint script in most packages.

entities: LearnerSummary: Created on run completion. Captures learnings, skills, run metrics. Auto-creates KnowledgeEntry records.
KnowledgeEntry: Project-scoped reusable knowledge. Supports procedure/pattern/lesson/skill types. Tracks usageCount and lastUsedAt.
Digest: Alerts for budget alerts (80%+), stuck runs (30min+), opportunities, weekly summaries, health check failures. Priority levels (low/medium/high/critical).
ReleaseHealthCheck: Smoke tests, integration tests, custom checks, merge checks. Status passed/failed.
RollbackAction: revert_commit and restore_checkpoint types. Auto-trigger for fullauto tier on check failure.
handlers: ctx.data handlers for learner-summary, learner-summaries, knowledge-entry, knowledge-entries, digest, digests, rollback-action, rollback-actions

ctx.actions handlers for create-learner-summary, create-knowledge-entry, update-knowledge-entry, create-digest, generate-stuck-run-digest, generate-budget-alert-digest, create-release-health-check, update-release-health-status, trigger-rollback, update-rollback-status
backend.quality: All entity types have companyId/projectId scoping enforced. Cross-company isolation verified in tests.

components: KnowledgeSection: learner summaries, knowledge entries with type filter tabs (All/Procedure/Pattern/Lesson/Skill)
DigestSection: digest cards with type labels, priority badges, summary text, Check Stuck Runs and Generate Budget Alert buttons
ReleaseHealthSection: health checks list with passed/failed badges, Mark Passed/Mark Failed/Trigger Rollback buttons, rollback actions list
ui.quality: UI components already implemented in advanced-execution milestone (advanced-ui-surfaces-035-041). Backend handlers wired to plugin actions.

nonBlockingIssues: Learner summary auto-creation logic in complete-delivery-run only creates entries for completed runs that have succeeded or failed — runs that are cancelled may not produce summaries, but this is acceptable behavior
Knowledge type filter uses inline union type instead of importing KnowledgeType from constants.ts — minor redundancy, no runtime impact
Digest priority assignment is heuristic-based (hardcoded thresholds) — acceptable for current scope, may need tuning as usage grows
summary: Feature knowledge-digests-release-health-and-rollback passes scrutiny. Full backend implementation for learner summaries, knowledge management, digests, release-health checks, and rollback actions. All action handlers registered, company-scoped, with cross-company isolation enforced. UI sections (KnowledgeSection, DigestSection, ReleaseHealthSection) were already implemented in the advanced-execution milestone and correctly wired to these handlers. All tests for VAL-AUTOPILOT-039/040/041 pass. No blocking issues.
